events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario is about heat trace work at rough-complete stage. The observed field condition is "missing end seal." NEC 427 covers fixed electric heating equipment. A missing end seal on heat trace is a non-compliance - end seals are required to protect the end of the heat trace cable from moisture ingress and to prevent shorts/arcing. This is a manufacturer requirement and code requirement under NEC 427.

Decision: fail
Risk: high (moisture ingress can cause short circuit, arcing, fire)
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 85-90% rough complete but missing critical component
Confidence: high
